name: pga-marketplace
description: Paulo Alves' personal Claude Code marketplace — Engineering Manager tooling for OutSystems R&D

plugins.name: initiative-dashboards
plugins.description: Tooling for Engineering Managers and Product Managers to summarise the progress of one initiative or a portfolio of initiatives into a self-contained HTML dashboard. Includes two skills: building-initiative-dashboard (single initiative or epic) and building-portfolio-dashboard (rollup across multiple initiatives or a Value Milestone, with portfolio KPIs and drill-down links). Both skills persist timestamped state snapshots on disk so successive runs accumulate a time series and surface a delta vs. the prior run.
